name: Taxpayer Assistance Order (TAO) Application

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers facing significant hardship, including immediate threats of adverse action, delays over 30 days in problem resolution, or incurring significant professional fees.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can apply for a TAO to stop or prevent IRS collection actions (like levies) or to compel the IRS to take action if they are suffering significant hardship or irreparable injury.
